title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 14 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 14 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 14 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to decline sharply. The most-traded contract I2501 hit a new low of 706.5 yuan/mt, slightly rebounded in the afternoon,and finally closed at 713 yuan/mt, down 3.32% for the day. Some traders suspended offers; steel mills were cautious and mainly inquired about prices.
